condition_summary: Upstream G01-G11 or equivalent PASS for run
notes: No derivative observables if point tables fail

condition_summary: Only policy-allowed columns and observable groups used
notes: Forbidden groups must not enter derivative path

condition_summary: n_points_used >= policy N_min for file or segment scope
notes: Insufficient data yields BLOCKED not silent success

condition_summary: All T_K and M_emu_clean finite where differenced
T_K sorted; if non_monotonic split into blocks per policy
notes: No derivative across reordering or duplicates without block split

condition_summary: min positive delta_T > threshold or BLOCKED
Derivative method and parameters recorded in provenance
Smoothing off unless explicit M_emu_smooth exception policy
All transition-shaped outputs tagged candidate-only in definition and notes
Outputs and notes must not assert Tc phase critical transition
notes: Policy enforcement in text and schema
